basic_details.job_title: IIM Sambalpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Post Doctoral Research Associate/ Post Doctoral Fellow Posts
basic_details.job_location: IIM Sambalpur campus / project-related field locations
basic_details.short_information: IIM Sambalpur is inviting applications for Two Post-Doctoral positions with remuneration of Rs. 60,000 per month. PhD/FPM holders from reputed institutions can apply. Last date to submit application is 2nd August 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be communicated to shortlisted candidates only

age_limit.age_details: Initially 1 Year, extendable based on performance and project needs

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all essential qualifications. Only applications meeting the criteria will be considered.
qualification.education_qualification: PhD/FPM in Economics, Operations Management, Management Science, or closely related areas from IIMs/IITs/NITs and other reputed institutions. Candidates who have submitted thesis and awaiting award may also apply.
qualification.experience: Knowledge of quantitative methods, optimization, econometrics, operations research, data analysis tools (R, Python, SPSS, Stata, Power BI etc.), report writing, and stakeholder management.

selection_process: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. The institute reserves the right to relax eligibility criteria or not to fill the positions.
and suitability. Interview of shortlisted candidates. Final selection subject to verification of documents.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates should submit their application as a single consolidated PDF containing:
Copies of degree certificates and transcripts
PhD/FPM thesis abstract or completion/submission certificate
One writing sample (published paper, working paper, project report, or thesis chapter)
Names and contact details of two professional/academic references
Email to: [email protected] Last Date: 2nd August 2026
important_instructions: The appointment is purely project-based and does not carry any claim for regular appointment at IIM Sambalpur. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the interview. The institute reserves the right to relax eligibility criteria in exceptional cases or cancel the recruitment. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For queries, write to [email protected]

content_sections.heading: IIM Sambalpur Post Doctoral Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIM Sambalpur is inviting applications for Two Post-Doctoral positions with remuneration of Rs. 60,000 per month. PhD/FPM holders from reputed institutions can apply. Last date to submit application is 2nd August 2026.

rows.indian_institute_of_management_sambalpur: Developing Strategic Vision 2036 and Integrated Human Resource Planning for OHPC
IIM Sambalpur campus / project-related field locations
Initially 1 Year, extendable based on performance and project needs

content_sections.heading: IIM Sambalpur Post Doctoral Positions 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

rows.date: To be communicated to shortlisted candidates only

content_sections.heading: IIM Sambalpur Post Doctoral Recruitment 2026 Position Details
content_sections.text: Two Post-Doctoral positions are being offered under the OHPC project. These are purely project-based contractual positions focused on strategic vision and HR planning.

content_sections.heading: IIM Sambalpur Post Doctoral Positions 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all essential qualifications. Only applications meeting the criteria will be considered.

rows.details: PhD/FPM in Economics, Operations Management, Management Science, or closely related areas from IIMs/IITs/NITs and other reputed institutions. Candidates who have submitted thesis and awaiting award may also apply.
Strong analytical, quantitative, and research-writing skills. Ability to work independently and in a team.
Knowledge of quantitative methods, optimization, econometrics, operations research, data analysis tools (R, Python, SPSS, Stata, Power BI etc.), report writing, and stakeholder management.
Single consolidated PDF with Cover letter, CV, certificates, thesis abstract, writing sample, and references.

content_sections.heading: IIM Sambalpur Post Doctoral Positions 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. The institute reserves the right to relax eligibility criteria or not to fill the positions. Shortlisting based on academic record, research experience, and suitability. Interview of shortlisted candidates. Final selection subject to verification of documents.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIM Sambalpur Post Doctoral Positions 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates should submit their application as a single consolidated PDF containing: Cover letter briefly stating suitability Detailed CV Copies of degree certificates and transcripts PhD/FPM thesis abstract or completion/submission certificate One writing sample (published paper, working paper, project report, or thesis chapter) Names and contact details of two professional/academic references Email to: [email protected] Last Date: 2nd August 2026

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIM Sambalpur Post Doctoral Positions 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The appointment is purely project-based and does not carry any claim for regular appointment at IIM Sambalpur. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the interview. The institute reserves the right to relax eligibility criteria in exceptional cases or cancel the recruitment. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For queries, write to [email protected]

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Sambalpur Post-Doctoral Positions 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the consolidated PDF application is 2nd August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many Post-Doctoral positions are available at IIM Sambalpur under OHPC project?
faq.answer: There are Two Post-Doctoral Research Associate / Fellow positions available.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Post-Doctoral Fellow at IIM Sambalpur?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration is Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IIM Sambalpur Post-Doctoral Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: PhD/FPM in Economics, Operations Management, Management Science or closely related areas from reputed institutions. Thesis-submitted candidates may also apply.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIM Sambalpur Post-Doctoral positions?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for IIM Sambalpur OHPC Post-Doctoral Project 2026?
faq.answer: Send a single consolidated PDF containing cover letter, CV, certificates, thesis abstract, writing sample, and references to [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the Post-Doctoral positions at IIM Sambalpur?
faq.answer: Initially one year, extendable based on project requirements and performance.

faq.question: Q8. Will IIM Sambalpur conduct an interview for Post-Doctoral selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What skills are preferred for IIM Sambalpur Post-Doctoral Fellow?
faq.answer: Proficiency in quantitative methods, data analysis tools (R, Python, SPSS, Stata, Power BI), report writing, and stakeholder management.

faq.question: Q10. Is the IIM Sambalpur Post-Doctoral appointment permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a purely project-based contractual position with no claim for regular appointment at IIM Sambalpur.
